headings.text: LDPE is a thermoplastic that creates parts with impact resistance and good flexibility
Using High-Performance PEEK, PEI Plastics for Machining, Molding
Selecting the Right Plastic for Your Next Molded Part
Material Alternatives for Plastic Injection Molding

images.alt: Selecting the Right Plastic for Your Next Molded Part

meta_description: Low density polyethylene or LDPE is an all-purpose resin with impact resistance, crack resistance, and excellent flexibility. Order custom LDPE parts and receive them within days.

sections.heading: Grab a Design Cube
sections.text: Grab a Design Cube Want to learn more about injection molding? Sign up to receive a Design Cube. This physical aid demonstrates how to properly design features commonly found on molded parts. GET DESIGN CUBE

sections.heading: LDPE Injection Molding Applications
sections.text: LDPE Injection Molding Applications LDPE is a flexible resin that is low cost, corrosion resistant, and durable. These properties makes it a good material choice for parts lik: Enclosures Caps Snap fits Lids
